actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件

fields.caption: 信保支付方式
fields.output: 风控客户.信保支付方式

fields.caption: 收 货 人
fields.output: 风控客户.收 货 人

actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,
       kh.kfrq,
       kh.wfgs,
       kh.bm,
       kh.kh_id,
       kh.country,
       kh.ssdq,
       kh.syms,
       kh.khly,
       kh.zffs,
       kh.zfqx,
       kh.xybx,
       kh.xbye,
       kh.xbqx,
       kh.ywry,
       kh.xbdm,
       kh.xbtt,
       kh.xbed,
       kh.xbzffs,
       khttxx.shr
FROM kh,khttxx 
WHERE (kh.company_name=:company_name) 
  AND (kh.fkgl="是") 
  AND (kh.sid=khttxx.pid) 
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件810
actions.caption: 未命名事件810

fields.caption: 说  明
fields.output: 风控客户.风控客户来源

actions.expression:
SELECT khly.khly,khly.khlyz,khly.sm 
FROM khly 
WHERE khly.khlyz=[风控客户.来源一级] 
  AND khly.khly=[风控客户.客户来源] 
ORDER BY khly.khly ASC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件456
actions.caption: 未命名事件456

fields.caption: 资信调查类型
fields.output: 风控客户.资信调查类型

actions.expression:
SELECT zxtc.sid,
       zxtc.zxtclx,
       zxtc.ywry,
       zxtc.bm,
       zxtc.wfgs,
       zxtc.sqry,
       zxtc.bz,
       zxtc.zxhf,
       zxtc.fkbz
FROM zxtc 
WHERE (zxtc.sqdh=[风控客户.申请单号]) 
ORDER BY zxtc.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 对应财务
actions.caption: 对应财务
actions.expression:
SELECT fkzw.sid 
FROM fkzw 
WHERE (fkzw.wxfp=[风控客户.逾期清单.外销发票]) 
  AND permission('风控账务') 
ORDER BY fkzw.sid ASC

view.params:
SELECT kh.company_name,kh.SID
FROM kh
WHERE   (kh.fkgl="是")
ORDER BY kh.SID ASC

SELECT syms.mc
FROM syms
ORDER BY syms.mc ASC

SELECT khly.khlyz
FROM khly group by khlyz

SELECT khly.KHLY
FROM khly where khlyz=[风控客户.来源一级] group by KHLY

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="市场采购代理模式")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="市场采购代理模式")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="市场采购代理模式")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="市场采购代理模式")
